prompt: Macro close-up: A luminous, electric blue (#3b82f6) digital crop grid overlay intersects precisely over the sharp, high-resolution eye of an East Asian female professional displayed on a glossy retina screen. The focus is razor-thin on the iris and the 'safe zone' guide lines, visualizing the tension between the square image and the circular crop. Extreme detail reveals the faint RGB sub-pixels of the display, emphasizing the need for 800x800 clarity. The background dissolves into a deep indigo (#1e40af) abstract bokeh, with a hint of a royal blue (#2563eb) device edge in the periphery. Vibrant Kodak Ektar 100 colors with punchy saturation, shot on Hasselblad X2D 100C, 85mm lens, f/2.8, natural skin texture, golden hour warmth, editorial photography for Vogue Business
